entry.title: Perplexity's Open-Source WANDR Benchmark Exposes How Badly Research Agents Fail at Scale
entry.summary: Perplexity open-sources WANDR, a 500-task benchmark exposing how badly research agents fail at large-scale, evidence-backed data collection

entry.title: Goodfire's Silico Cuts Hallucinations 37% by Seeing Inside AI Models
entry.summary: Goodfire's Silico opens its private beta, letting an AI agent autonomously run interpretability experiments â reproducing months of research in days

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude for Teachers Brings Free AI to 3.5M US Classrooms
entry.summary: Anthropic launches free premium Claude access for verified US K-12 teachers, with state-standard-aligned lesson planning and FERPA-grade privacy built in

entry.title: Anthropic Bets $10M on Canadian AI Research to Deepen Its Roots
entry.summary: Anthropic pledges $10M CAD and Claude API credits to eight Canadian research institutions, deepening ties with the country that invented deep learning

entry.title: Anthropic Makes Claude Artifacts Multiplayer so Teams Can Build Together
entry.summary: Claude Artifacts now support real-time multiplayer editing, public sharing links, and Claude Tag can build internal tools directly from Slack threads

entry.title: Google's Gemini Omni Flash Tops Video Leaderboards With Built-In Reasoning
entry.summary: Google's Gemini Omni Flash debuts at the top of Artificial Analysis video leaderboards, beating Seedance 2.0 with conversational editing at $6/min

entry.title: Anthropic Discovers Claude Expresses Warmer Values in Arabic Than English
entry.summary: Anthropic analyzed 300K+ conversations to map how Claude's expressed values shift across model versions and 20 languages, revealing a four-axis framework that could reshape how AI behavior is monitored and steered.

entry.title: Cerebras Runs Gemma 4 31B at 35x GPU Speed on Its Cloud
entry.summary: Gemma 4 31B hits 1,851 tokens/sec on Cerebras wafer-scale hardware, making real-time multimodal and agentic loops practical for the first time

entry.title: Parallel Web Systems' Turbo Cuts AI Search Costs 14x at 200ms
entry.summary: Parallel Web Systems launches Turbo mode for its Search API: 200ms median latency, $1 per 1,000 requests, and benchmark-leading accuracy against Exa, Tavily, and Brave.

entry.title: Sakana AI's Smart Bricks Recognize Their Own Shape Without Any Central Brain
entry.summary: Sakana AI publishes in Nature Communications: physical bricks running identical tiny neural nets collectively recognize their own 3D shape and guide self-repair, with no central controller and no brick knowing its position.

entry.title: Prime Intellect's Verifiers v1 Rewrites AI Agent Training From the Ground Up
entry.summary: Prime Intellect overhauls its RL environment stack with composable tasksets, harnesses, and a smarter trace format that makes long-horizon agentic training actually feasible.

entry.title: China Mobile's JT-4.1 Flash Challenges DeepSeek With a Free 236B Model
entry.summary: China Mobile's JT-4.1 Flash 236B A21B scores 39 on the AA Intelligence Index, closing the gap to China's AI frontier with a massive leap from its predecessor.
